title: shim.c: cross-reference to build.rs wolfTPM version warning is incomplete
description: wolftpm_rs_shim.c line 101: 'See: wolftpm-sys/build.rs for the wolfTPM version warning' — a reader of the C file must hunt for the warning without knowing what to look for. The comment should briefly state the warning (e.g., 'build.rs emits a warning if wolfTPM version != 4.0.0; this shim was tested against fbbf6fe / 4.0.0') so the C file is self-contained.
